share.shareUrl: Hey, I think you will love Tiger Trail - Royal Orchid HAL Airport	, Royal Orchid Hotel, Old Airport Road, Bangalore on Swiggy Dineout https://swiggy.onelink.me/BVRZ?af_dp=swiggydiners%3A%2F%2Fdetails%2F25281%3Fsource%3Dsharing Happy dining!

offers.title: Flat 15% off on total bill

tnc.title: Offer terms & conditions
texts: Discount on this restaurant is applicable throughout the day for you.
You can claim this discount on any bill amount. You can pay up to Rs. 3,00,000 per transaction via Swiggy Dineout at a restaurant.
You get a flat discount on your bill amount with no upper limit.
This offer cannot be clubbed with an in-house offer or offers from other platforms
The offer's availability on National/Public Holidays is as per the restaurant's discretion
The restaurant may levy Service charge/Entry fees as per its discretion

The discount may not be applicable on Combos, Meal, Beverages, MRP Products, Beer Buckets, Bottled Drinks, Hookah/Seesha, Discounted platters/Thalis, Buffets, as per Catch items and special menus' as per the restaurant's discretion.
Any items ordered that are not included in the offer will be billed separately.
Menu prices and items may change without prior notice.
Weekend and weekdays offer might differ as per restaurant’s discretion.

offers.description: Pay bill via Swiggy to get offer

secondarySubtext.title: Valid all day | Pay bill via Swiggy to get this discount

tnc.title: Offer terms & conditions
texts: Apply the coupon code HDFCINFINIA to avail the offer
Applicable twice per user per calendar month
User will get a maximum discount of ₹500 per transaction
Offer is available only for HDFC Bank Infinia Credit Cardholders
Transaction amount (amount after deduction of restaurant discounts) of ₹3500 or more payable using an HDFC Bank Infinia Credit Card are eligible for the discount
Other T&Cs may apply

secondarySubtext.title: Use coupon code HDFCINFINIA | Avail on final payable amount of ₹3500 or more

tnc.title: Offer terms & conditions
texts: Apply the coupon code HDFCCCEMI to avail the offer
Applicable once per user per calendar month
User will get a maximum discount of ₹500 per transaction
Offer is available only for HDFC Bank Credit Card EMI transactions
Transaction amount (amount after deduction of restaurant discounts) of ₹3500 or more payable using HDFC Bank Credit Card EMI payment are eligible for the discount
The offer is an instant discount and will be provided upfront at the time of purchase
Refer the given link for detailed terms and conditions of EMI transactions - hdfcbank.com/personal/borrow/popular-loans/easy-emi/easyemi-on-consumer-durables
Other T&Cs may apply

secondarySubtext.title: Use coupon code HDFCCCEMI | Avail on final payable amount of ₹3500 or more

tnc.title: Offer terms & conditions
texts: Apply the coupon code HDFCDINERS to avail the offer
Applicable twice per user per calendar month
User will get a maximum discount of ₹400 per transaction
Offer is available only for HDFC Bank Diners Club Black/Biz Black Credit Cardholders
Transaction amount (amount after deduction of restaurant discounts) of ₹3000 or more payable using HDFC Bank Diners Club Black/Biz Black Credit Card are eligible for the discount
Other T&Cs may apply

secondarySubtext.title: Use coupon code HDFCDINERS | Avail on final payable amount of ₹3000 or more

tnc.title: Offer terms & conditions
texts: Apply the coupon code HDFCCARDS to avail the offer
Applicable twice per user per calendar month
User wili get a flat ₹200 discount per transaction
Offer is available for all HDFC Bank Credit Cardholders except HDFC Bank Infinia & Diners Club Black Credit Cards
Not valid on Swiggy HDFC Bank Credit Card
Transaction amount (amount after deduction of restaurant discounts) of ₹2000 or more payable using HDFC Bank Credit Card are eligible for the discount
Other T&Cs may apply

secondarySubtext.title: Use coupon code HDFCCARDS | Avail on final payable amount of ₹2000 or more

tnc.title: Offer terms & conditions
texts: Apply the coupon code MBKDINEUPI to avail the offer
Applicable once per user during the offer period
Transaction amount (amount after deduction of restaurant discounts) of ₹1500 or more payable using MobiKwik UPI are eligible for cashback
Cashback can be claimed through a Scratch card on the MobiKwik app in the rewards section & the Scratch card will be valid for 7 days only
Other T&Cs may apply

secondarySubtext.title: Use coupon code MBKDINEUPI | Avail on final payable amount of ₹1500 or more

tnc.title: Offer terms & conditions
texts: Apply the coupon code MBKDINE to avail the offer
Applicable once per user during the offer period
Transaction amount (amount after deduction of restaurant discounts) of ₹1500 or more payable using MobiKwik Wallet are eligible for cashback
Cashback can be claimed through a Scratch card on the MobiKwik app in the rewards section & the Scratch card will be valid for 7 days only
Other T&Cs may apply

secondarySubtext.title: Use coupon code MBKDINE | Avail on final payable amount of ₹1500 or more

tnc.title: Offer terms & conditions
texts: Apply the coupon code POPUPI to avail the offer
Applicable once per user during the offer period
Transaction amount (amount after deduction of restaurant discounts) of ₹999 or more payable using POP UPI are eligible for cashback
The customer will redeem POP Coins for cashback
The customer will get cashback in their POP Cashback Zone
Other T&Cs may apply

secondarySubtext.title: Use coupon code POPUPI | Avail on final payable amount of ₹999 or more

tnc.title: Offer terms & conditions
texts: Valid only on Swiggy HDFC Bank Credit Card or Swiggy Blck HDFC Bank Credit Card
Monthly cashback limit of ₹1500 on Swiggy spends
Cashback will be processed in the next statement cycle
Other T&Cs may apply

secondarySubtext.title: Avail on final payable amount of ₹249 or more
